name: @scee/db
_comment_exports: Other workspaces import this package via: import { prisma } from '@scee/db'

scripts._comment_build: 1) Generate Prisma Client from schema.prisma  2) Compile TS → dist/
scripts._comment_db_commands: Database lifecycle management (run from monorepo root via 'npm run db:*')
scripts._comment_prepare: Auto-generates Prisma client when this package is installed

_comment_seed: Prisma seed command — populates problems and demo users for development
